texto: Fifteen-year-old girls produce children with sixteen-year-old boys in the backseat of cars and in the stairwells of apartment buildings. Why can't two loving adults who have contemplated parenthood and are prepared to offer love, patience, and devotion come up with enough chromosomal matter to stick together and create a child?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Scott Simon que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Fifteen-year-old girls produce children with sixteen-year-old boys in the backseat of cars and in…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, adoption, gay-parents, com foco em gay-parents e parenting.
